articles.title: RCB Crushes CSK: Tim David & Rajat Patidar's IPL 2025 Masterclass
articles.what_this_means: RCB dismantled CSK with a record-breaking 250/3—the highest score ever against Chennai in IPL history. Tim David and Rajat Patidar led a brutal batting assault that left CSK helpless. If you missed the 1:30 AM US broadcast, catch the full highlights on Willow TV or YouTube next morning.

articles.title: Jackie Shroff & Suniel Shetty Team Up? 2025 Bollywood News
articles.what_this_means: Jackie Shroff and Suniel Shetty just posted a cryptic WhatsApp-style reel hinting at a major collaboration, sparking wild speculation among fans. No official details yet, but it's likely a film or OTT series announcement coming soon. We'll update you the moment it's confirmed.

articles.title: AI Semiconductor Boom: What It Means for Your Tech Career in 2026
articles.what_this_means: Goldman Sachs projects sharp semiconductor revenue growth through 2026 driven by AI demand, creating urgent hiring in GPU optimization, MLOps, and AI infrastructure roles. Indian engineers who specialize in these areas will see 20-40% salary premiums—but only if they position themselves now. The window for career pivots is open through mid-2026.

articles.title: CSK's Brevis Injury Update: Will He Play Delhi Capitals?
articles.what_this_means: CSK's Ryan Brevis is expected to be fit for the Delhi Capitals match after missing IPL 2026's opening three games. This is a significant boost for CSK's middle-order depth and tournament ambitions. US fans can catch all the action via Willow TV or YouTube highlights.
